question:
An administrator is responsible for ensuring the security and reliability of Universal Containers' (UC) CRM data. UC needs enhanced data protection and up-to-date AI capabilities. UC also needs to include relevant information from a Salesforce record to be merged with the prompt. 
Which feature in the Einstein Trust Layer best supports UC's need?
options: Data masking
Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval
Zero-data retention policy
explanation: Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval en el Einstein Trust Layer permite incluir información de registros de Salesforce en el prompt de forma segura, protegiendo datos sensibles. Data masking oculta datos pero no los incluye dinámicamente; zero-data retention solo controla la retención.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has recently received an increased number of support cases. As a result, UC has hired more customer support reps and has started to assign some of the ongoing cases to newer reps. 
Which generative AI solution should the new support reps use to understand the details of a case without reading through each case comment?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot
Einstein Sales Summaries
Einstein Work Summaries
explanation: Einstein Work Summaries permite a los nuevos reps de soporte entender rápidamente los detalles de un caso sin leer todos los comentarios, resumiendo automáticamente el historial del caso. Einstein Sales Summaries es para ventas y Einstein Agentforce es una plataforma más amplia, no específicamente para resumir casos.

question: After an agent selects a topic, what is an important factor the reasoning engine uses to select the action?
options: The priority given to each action
OThe explicit order of actions in the topic
The name and instructions of the actions
explanation: The original answer incorrectly stated that the engine uses 'priority given to each action', but Agentforce does not have priority settings for actions. The correct answer is that the Reasoning Engine evaluates the 'name and instructions' of each action to contextually and deterministically select the best one.

question:
An AI Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client.
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
explanation: Para integrar un LLM personalizado fine-tuneado en OpenAI a Salesforce de forma segura, se debe usar Einstein Studio Model Builder para registrar y gestionar el modelo externo. Hacer callouts directos a OpenAI o incrustar con iFrame no proporciona las garantías de seguridad y control del Trust Layer.

question: Universal Containers is setting up the data library configuration within the Agentforce Builder. What is true regarding Agentforce Data Libraries?
options: An agent can have only one data library assigned to it.
Each data category can only have one data library.
Only data library owners can assign it to the agent.
explanation: En la configuración de Agentforce Builder, un agente está limitado a conectarse a una única Data Library (Biblioteca de datos). Esta biblioteca consolidada debe contener todas las categorías de datos, conocimientos y documentos relevantes que el agente necesite utilizar como fuentes de información para sus respuestas (RAG).

question: Universal Containers (UC) is building a Flex prompt template. UC needs to use data returned by the flow in the prompt template. Which flow element should UC use?
options: Add Flow Instructions
Add Flex Instructions
Add Prompt Instructions
explanation: Al configurar un flujo de Salesforce que provee datos dinámicos a una plantilla Flex Prompt, se debe emplear el elemento lógico específico denominado 'Add Prompt Instructions' dentro del Flow Builder. Este elemento permite tomar la información resultante del flujo e incrustarla en el formato adecuado para el texto del prompt que se enviará al LLM.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked to optimize a business process flow by assigning actions to agents within the Salesforce Agentforce Platform. What is the correct method for the Agentforce Specialist to assign actions to an Agent?
options: Assign the action to a Topic first on Action Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first in Agent Builder.
Assign the action to a Topic first on the Agent Actions detail page.
explanation: Actions are assigned to Topics directly within the Agent Builder UI. The reasoning engine routes utterances to the appropriate Topic, which then utilizes the assigned Action.

question: When is the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol an appropriate communication choice?
options: When agents need to invoke third-party APIs
When agents need to access tools
When agents need to collaborate
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) es apropiado cuando los agentes necesitan colaborar entre si, delegando tareas o compartiendo contexto. Para invocar APIs de terceros se usa MCP, y para acceder a herramientas tambien se usa MCP. A2A es especificamente para colaboracion y comunicacion entre agentes.

question:
Universal Containers wants to make a sales proposal and directly use data from multiple unrelated objects (standard and custom) in a prompt template. 
What should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Create a Flex template to add resources with standard and custom objects as inputs.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object that connects the records temporarily,
Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from standard and custom objects.
explanation: Un Flex Template permite agregar múltiples recursos de objetos estándar y personalizados como inputs, siendo la solución correcta para prompts que necesitan datos de objetos no relacionados. Las plantillas estándar están limitadas a un objeto base y no admiten múltiples fuentes de datos independientes.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to ground a new prompt template with the User related list.
What should the AI Specialist consider?
options: The User related list should have View All access.
The User related list needs to be included on the record page.
The User related list is not supported in prompt templates.
explanation: El objeto Usuario (User) y sus listas relacionadas no están soportadas actualmente para ser utilizadas directamente como listas relacionadas (related lists) en el grounding de las plantillas de prompt (prompt templates).

question: What is the main purpose of Prompt Builder?
options: A tool for developers to use in Visual Studio Code that creates prompts for Apex programming, assisting developers in writing code more efficiently.
A tool that enables companies to create reusable prompts for large language models (LLMs), bringing generative AI responses to their flow of work
A tool within Salesforce offering real-time Al-powered suggestions and guidance to users, Improving productivity and decision-making.
explanation: El propósito principal de Prompt Builder es permitir a las empresas crear, probar y gestionar plantillas de prompts reutilizables para LLMs, integrando las respuestas de la IA generativa directamente en los flujos de trabajo de Salesforce.

question:
An AI Specialist turned on Einstein Generative AI in Setup. Now, the AI Specialist would like to create custom prompt templates in Prompt Builder. However, they cannot access Prompt Builder in the Setup menu.
What is causing the problem?
options: The Prompt Template User permission set was not assigned correctly.
The Prompt Template Manager permission set was not assigned correctly.
The large language model (LLM) was not configured correctly in Data Cloud.
explanation: Para poder acceder y crear plantillas de prompts personalizadas en Prompt Builder desde el menú de Setup, el usuario debe tener asignado el conjunto de permisos 'Prompt Template Manager' (Gestor de plantillas de prompt).

question: How does Secure Data Retrieval ensure that only authorized users can access necessary Salesforce data for dynamic grounding?
options: Retrieves Salesforce data based on the 'Run As' user's permissions.
Retrieves Salesforce data based on the user's permissions executing the prompt.
Retrieves Salesforce data based on the Prompt template's object permissions.
explanation: Secure Data Retrieval recupera datos de Salesforce basandose en los permisos del usuario que esta ejecutando el prompt. Esto garantiza que cada usuario solo vea los datos a los que tiene acceso segun su perfil y permission sets, respetando la seguridad a nivel de registro y campo.

question: Universal Containers is planning a marketing email about products that most closely match a customer's expressed interests. What should the company use to generate this email?
options: Custom sales email template which is grounded with interest and product information
Standard email marketing template using Apex or flows for matching interest in products
Standard email draft with Einstein and choose standard email template
explanation: A custom sales email template allows you to ground the prompt with specific CRM data regarding the customer's interests and matching product information, providing highly tailored email generation.

question: What is automatically created when a custom search index is created in Data Cloud?
options: A retriever that shares the name of the custom search index.
A data stream and a data lake object.
A prompt template linked to the search index.
explanation: Cuando se crea un search index personalizado en Data Cloud, automaticamente se crea un retriever con el mismo nombre. Este retriever puede usarse directamente en prompts y agentes para realizar busquedas sobre el indice.

question: Cloud Kicks wants to integrate its agent with its custom website. The goal is for customers to interact with the custom agent chat interface. Which approach provides the framework for the custom web application to communicate with the agent?
options: Agent API
Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Agent to Agent (A2A)
explanation: La API del Agente (Agent API) es la interfaz REST de Salesforce que permite a aplicaciones de terceros o sitios web personalizados conectarse de manera programática, enviando mensajes y recibiendo respuestas de un agente de Agentforce, proporcionando el marco ideal para construir una interfaz de chat externa a medida.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to use Flow to bring data from unified Data Cloud objects to prompt templates. Which type of flow should UC use?
options: Template-triggered prompt flow
Data Cloud-triggered flow
Unified-object linking flow
explanation: Use un template-triggered prompt flow para llevar datos a plantillas de prompts.

question: When a customer chat is initiated, which functionality in Salesforce provides generative AI replies or draft emails based on recommended Knowledge articles?
options: Einstein Reply Recommendations
Einstein Service Replies
Einstein Grounding
explanation: Einstein Service Replies genera respuestas basadas en artículos de Knowledge durante el chat.

question: How does the AI retriever function within Data Cloud?
options: It automatically extracts and reformats raw data from diverse sources into standardized datasets for use in historical trend analysis and forecasting.
It monitors and aggregates data quality metrics across various data pipelines to ensure only high-integrity data is used for strategic decision-making.
It performs contextual searches over an indexed repository to quickly fetch the most relevant documents, enabling grounding AI responses with trustworthy, verifiable information.
explanation: El retriever hace búsquedas contextuales sobre datos indexados en Data Cloud para traer documentos grounded. Es la pieza clave para entregar información verificable a la IA.

question: Universal Containers is building a digital shopping assistant that needs to dynamically generate product recommendations using information from the company's external product recommendation predictive model through APIs. Which Agentforce capability should make it easier for the agent to consume the external product recommendation tool?
options: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Hugging Face
Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol
explanation: Model Context Protocol (MCP) es la capacidad de Agentforce que permite al agente descubrir y consumir dinamicamente herramientas y APIs externas, como un modelo predictivo de recomendaciones de productos. MCP facilita la integracion con herramientas externas de forma estandarizada sin necesidad de codificacion custom.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts wants visibility into credit usage associated with testing. Which feature supports this?
options: Agentforce Analytics
Digital Wallet
Testing Center
explanation: Digital Wallet es la funcionalidad de Salesforce que proporciona visibilidad sobre el uso de creditos de Agentforce, incluyendo los asociados a las pruebas. Permite monitorear el consumo de Einstein Requests y otros creditos de IA.

question:
Universal Containers implemented Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for its users. One user complains that Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is not deleting activities from the past 7 days.
What is the reason for this issue?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Delete Record Action permission is not associated to the user.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  does not have the permission to delete the user's records.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  does not support the Delete Record action.
explanation: Por motivos de seguridad y diseño de la plataforma, las acciones estándar de Agentforce no soportan la eliminación directa de registros (Delete Record action). El agente no puede borrar registros por sí solo sin flujos personalizados o configuraciones específicas de mayor complejidad.

question: Universal Containers needs to bring individual customer warranties from an external system into Data Cloud. They want Agentforce to return warranty-related responses only for accounts whose warranty status is active. Which search approach should the Agentforce Specialist configure to ensure warranty-related information is retrieved correctly?
options: Depend on Agentforce instructions to enforce warranty constraints and include only WarrantyStatus = Active results.
Store the account's warranty status in an Agentforce custom variable to dynamically filter warranties during retrieval.
Use Hybrid Search and apply pre-filtering in a new custom retriever for matching accounts and where the WarrantyStatus = Active field.
explanation: Para garantizar que el modelo de lenguaje solo utilice registros válidos y activos, la mejor práctica es aplicar pre-filtrado directamente en el proceso de recuperación de datos mediante un 'Custom Retriever' en Einstein Studio, aplicando filtros sobre campos de metadatos (como WarrantyStatus = Active) antes de la búsqueda vectorial.

question: Universal Containers aims to streamline the sales team's daily tasks by using AI. When considering these new workflows, which improvement requires the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Populate an AI-generated time-to-close estimation to opportunities
Populate an AI-generated summary field for sales contracts.
Populate an AI-generated lead score for new leads.
explanation: Poblar un campo de resumen generado por IA para contratos de ventas requiere Prompt Builder con un Field Generation template. Time-to-close y lead score son predicciones que usan modelos predictivos de Einstein, no Prompt Builder.

question: Which feature in the Einstein Trust Layer helps to minimize the risks of jailbreaking and prompt injection attacks?
options: Secure Data Retrieval and Grounding
Data Masking
Prompt Defense
explanation: Prompt Defense es la característica del Einstein Trust Layer que protege contra ataques de jailbreaking e inyección de prompts, actuando como barrera de seguridad en las interacciones con el LLM. Secure Data Retrieval protege datos en tránsito y Data Masking oculta información sensible, pero ninguno aborda específicamente los ataques de manipulación de prompts.

question: What is the primary advantage of creating an individual retriever instead of the default retriever?
options: Individual retrievers can aggregate multiple data spaces and data model objects (DMOs) into a unified retriever output.
Individual retrievers allow the configuration of filters, specified fields, and how many results are returned.
Individual retrievers automatically generate new search indexes and dynamically update vectors.
explanation: La ventaja principal de un retriever individual es que permite configurar filtros especificos, elegir que campos se incluyen y controlar cuantos resultados se devuelven. Esto proporciona mayor precision y control sobre el contenido recuperado comparado con el retriever por defecto.

question: An Agentforce Specialist at Universal Containers (UC) is building with no-code tools only. They have many small accounts that are only touched periodically by a specialized sales team, and UC wants to maximize the sales operations team's time. UC wants to help prep the sales team for calls by: • Summarizing past purchases • Displaying products the contact has shown interest in (with data captured via Data Cloud) • Providing a recap of past email and phone conversations that have transcripts Which approach should the Agentforce Specialist recommend to achieve this goal?
options: Deploy UC's own custom foundational model on this data first.
Use a prompt template grounded on CRM and Data Cloud data using standard foundation models.
Fine tune the standard foundational model due to the complexity of the dat
explanation: Al requerirse una solución exclusivamente 'no-code', la recomendación es usar una plantilla de prompt en Prompt Builder alimentada (grounded) directamente con los datos consolidados de CRM y Data Cloud. Esto permite aprovechar los Modelos Fundacionales estándar disponibles a través de Einstein Trust Layer para realizar resúmenes sin la alta complejidad y el costo de ajustar (fine-tune) modelos privados o importar un LLM personalizado.

question: Which part of the Einstein Trust Layer architecture leverages an organization's own data within a large language model (LLM) prompt to confidently return relevant and accurate responses?
options: Prompt Defense
Data Masking
Dynamic Grounding
explanation: Dynamic Grounding es la parte del Einstein Trust Layer que incorpora datos propios de la organizacion dentro del prompt del LLM para retornar respuestas relevantes y precisas. Prompt Defense protege contra ataques y Data Masking oculta datos sensibles, pero ninguno enriquece el prompt con datos del CRM.

question:
An AI Specialist built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. 
What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
explanation: Los errores de token limit son aleatorios porque el número de tokens generados varía según el contenido dinámico del registro procesado; algunos registros tienen más datos que otros. El template no es el problema ni la demanda del LLM; es la variabilidad inherente de los datos de cada registro.

question: Universal Containers (UC) plans to deploy an Agentforce Service Agent and wants to enable Agentforce in Slack so teams can interact with agents directly in Slack channels. Which description represents the key steps required to enable Agentforce in Slack?
options: Enable the default Slack channel Agentforce, and assign Slack agent access to users.
Configure the Slack workflow to invoke the Agentforce API, enabling users to interact with agents through predefined triggers and automated steps.
Configure the Slack agent connection and, in Manage Agentforce, install the agent, then assign agent access to users.
explanation: Para habilitar Agentforce en Slack, los pasos clave son: configurar la conexion del agente de Slack, en Manage Agentforce instalar el agente y luego asignar acceso al agente a los usuarios. Este proceso de tres pasos conecta correctamente el agente con los canales de Slack.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is creating a custom action for Agentforce. Which setting should the Agentforce Specialist test and iterate on to ensure the action performs as expected?
options: Action Instructions
Action Name
Action Input
explanation: Action Instructions son la configuración clave para iterar y validar el comportamiento de una acción. Ajustarlas permite mejorar la precisión del flow y los outcomes.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is experimenting with using public Generative AI models and is familiar with the language required to get the information it needs. However, it can be time consuming for both UC's sales and service reps to type in the prompt to get the information they need, and ensure prompt consistency.
Which Salesforce feature should a Salesforce AI Specialist recommend to address these concerns?
options: Einstein Recommendation Builder
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action: Query Records
Einstein Prompt Builder and Prompt Templates
explanation: Einstein Prompt Builder con Prompt Templates es la solución para estandarizar y reutilizar prompts complejos, evitando que los usuarios tengan que escribirlos manualmente cada vez. Esto garantiza consistencia en los prompts y ahorra tiempo a los equipos de ventas y servicio.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is looking to improve its sales team's productivity by providing real-time insights and recommendations during customer interactions. Why should UC consider using Agentforce Sales Agent?
options: To track customer interactions for future analysis
To automate the entire sales process for maximum efficiency
To streamline the sales process and increase conversion rates
explanation: La razon principal para usar Agentforce Sales Agent es agilizar el proceso de ventas y aumentar las tasas de conversion proporcionando insights y recomendaciones en tiempo real durante las interacciones con clientes, no para automatizar completamente el proceso ni solo para tracking.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) uses Salesforce Service Cloud to support its customers and agents handling cases. UC is considering implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot  and extending Service Cloud to mobile users. 
When would Einstein Agentforce or copilot  implementation be most advantageous?
options: When the goal is to streamline customer support processes and improve response times
When the main objective is to enhance data security and compliance measures
When the focus is on optimizing marketing campaigns and strategies
explanation: Einstein Agentforce es más ventajoso cuando el objetivo es agilizar los procesos de soporte al cliente y mejorar los tiempos de respuesta, no para seguridad de datos ni optimización de marketing. Su valor principal está en la automatización inteligente de interacciones de servicio al cliente.

question: Universal Containers needs to create Data Cloud reports to understand agent behavior. Which data lake object (DLO) represents an overarching container capturing contiguous interactions with one or more AI agents?
options: AIAgentInteraction
AIAgentInteractionMessage
AIAgentSession
explanation: AIAgentSession es el DLO que representa el contenedor principal que captura interacciones continuas con uno o mas agentes de IA. AIAgentInteraction captura interacciones individuales y AIAgentInteractionMessage captura mensajes especificos dentro de una interaccion.

question: Universal Containers recently launched a pilot program to integrate conversational AI into its CRM business operations with Agentforce Agents. How should the Agentforce Specialist monitor Agents' usability and the assignment of actions?
options: Run Agent Analytics
Query Agent logs via Metadata API
Use Platform Debug Logs
explanation: Use Agent Analytics para monitorear usabilidad y asignación de acciones.

question: Universal Containers wants to test agents while preserving real data and isolating from production. Which environment should the company use with Testing Center?
options: Use personal developer orgs unrepresentative of production dat
Use production org directly with test assertions.
Use sandbox environments replicated from production for safe testing.
explanation: La mejor práctica para probar agentes con Testing Center de forma segura y realista es utilizar entornos Sandbox que sean réplicas de producción (como Partial Copy o Full Sandbox). Esto permite usar datos reales para validar el comportamiento del agente y probar aserciones sin poner en riesgo la integridad de los datos ni la operación en el entorno de producción.

question: Universal Containers (UC) recently rolled out Einstein Generative AI capabilities and has created a custom prompt to summarize case records. Users have reported that the case summaries generated are not returning the appropriate information. What is the most likely root cause?
options: The LLM model selected is not compatible with case summarization.
The prompt template has not been activated in production.
The data being used for grounding is incorrect or incomplete.
explanation: Cuando los resumenes generados no devuelven la informacion apropiada, la causa mas probable es que los datos de grounding sean incorrectos o incompletos. El LLM genera respuestas basadas en el contexto proporcionado; si el grounding falla, las respuestas no seran precisas.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to capture and store detailed interaction data for all agents. Which feature should help UC get a full view of the agent's behavior from start to finish, including reasoning engine executions, actions, prompt and gateway inputs/outputs, error messages, and final responses?
options: Agentforce Analytics
Utterance Analysis
Agentforce Session Tracing
explanation: Agentforce Session Tracing proporciona una vista completa del comportamiento del agente de principio a fin, incluyendo ejecuciones del reasoning engine, acciones, inputs/outputs del prompt y gateway, mensajes de error y respuestas finales. Es la herramienta mas detallada para analisis de sesiones de agente.

question: Universal Containers (UC) plans to implement prompt templates that utilize the standard foundation models. Which technique should UC use to get more contextual and relevant responses from the LLM?
options: Ask it to role-play as a character in the prompt template to provide more context to the LLM.
Increase the max tokens parameter to allow longer responses.
Use only keyword-based grounding to ensure deterministic outputs.
explanation: Pedir al LLM que adopte el rol de un personaje especifico (role-play) en el prompt template es una tecnica efectiva para obtener respuestas mas contextuales y relevantes. Esta tecnica de prompt engineering ayuda al modelo a generar respuestas mas alineadas con el caso de uso especifico.

question: A Salesforce Administrator wants to generate personalized, targeted emails that incorporate customer interaction data. The admin wants to leverage large language models (LLMs) to write the emails, and wants to reuse templates for different products and customers. Which solution approach should the admin leverage?
options: Create a Sales Email prompt template type.
Use Sales Email standard templates.
Create a Field Generation prompt template type.
explanation: Crear plantilla de prompt de Sales Email reutilizable para diferentes clientes.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) tiene como beneficio clave proporcionar un marco estandarizado que permite a los agentes de diferentes proveedores descubrirse y comunicarse entre sí de forma segura, facilitando la interoperabilidad entre distintos ecosistemas de IA.

question: Universal Containers deployed the new Agentforce Sales Development Representative (SDR) into production, but sales reps are saying they can't find it. What is causing this issue?
options: Sales rep users do not have access to the SDR Agent object.
Sales rep users profiles are missing the Allow SDR Agent permission.
Sales rep users are missing the Use SDR Agent permission set.
explanation: La causa habitual es no asignar el permission set Use SDR Agent. Sin ese permiso, los reps no pueden ver o usar el agente.

question: A data science team has trained an XGBoost classification model for product recommendations on Databricks. The Agentforce Specialist is tasked with bringing inferences for product recommendations from this model into Data Cloud as a stand-alone DMO. How should the Agentforce Specialist set this up?
options: Create the serving endpoint in Databricks, then configure the model using Model Builder.
Create the serving endpoint in Einstein Studio, then configure the model using Model Builder.
Create the serving endpoint in Databricks, then configure the model using a Python SDK connector.
explanation: Para integrar un modelo de Databricks en Data Cloud, primero se debe crear el serving endpoint en Databricks donde esta hospedado el modelo, y luego configurar la conexion al modelo en Salesforce usando Model Builder. Einstein Studio no puede crear endpoints en plataformas externas.

question: When is the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol an appropriate communication choice?
options: When agents need to invoke third-party APIs
When agents need to access tools
When agents need to collaborate
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) es apropiado cuando los agentes necesitan colaborar entre si, delegando tareas o compartiendo contexto. Para invocar APIs de terceros se usa MCP, y para acceder a herramientas tambien se usa MCP. A2A es especificamente para colaboracion y comunicacion entre agentes.

question:
Universal Containers’ data science team is hosting a generative large language model (LLM) on Amazon Web Services (AWS). 
What should the team use to access externally-hosted models in the Salesforce Platform?
options: Model Builder
App Builder
Agentforce or copilot  Builder
explanation: Model Builder es la herramienta de Salesforce para conectar y gestionar modelos LLM externos alojados en plataformas como AWS. App Builder es para interfaces de usuario y Agentforce Builder es para configurar agentes, no para registrar modelos externos en la plataforma.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has registered an external service and created a template-triggered prompt flow that invokes the external service to fetch data from a REST API. UC now needs to make the response data from the external service usable inside a prompt template as a merge field when the template runs. How should UC meet this requirement?
options: Use External Service Record merge fields.
Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use the 'Add Prompt Instructions' flow element.
explanation: En un template-triggered prompt flow, para que los datos obtenidos (por ejemplo, de un External Service) se pasen al prompt template y se usen en la resolucion, se debe usar el elemento 'Add Prompt Instructions' en el flow. No existen los 'External Service Record merge fields'.

question: Universal Containers needs to create a prompt template that provides a detailed product description based on the latest product data. The description will be used in marketing materials to ensure consistency and accuracy. Which prompt template type should UC use?
options: Record Summary
Sales Email
Field Generation
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo correcto para generar una descripcion de producto detallada que se almacene en un campo especifico del registro. Permite generar contenido de IA para un campo individual con revision humana, ideal para garantizar consistencia y precision en materiales de marketing.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked with creating a prompt template for a sales team. The template needs to generate a summary of all related opportunities for a given Account. Which grounding technique should the Agentforce Specialist use to include data from the related list of opportunities in the prompt template?
options: Use formula fields to reference the related list.
Use merge fields to reference the default related list of opportunities.
Use merge fields to reference a custom related list.
explanation: Use merge fields para referenciar el related list predeterminado de oportunidades.

question: What is the correct process to leverage Prompt Builder in a Salesforce org?
options: Select the appropriate prompt template type to use, select one of Salesforce’s standard prompts, determine the object to associate the prompt, select a record to validate against, and associate the prompt to an action.

Select the appropriate prompt template type to use, develop the prompt within the prompt workspace, select resources to dynamically insert CRM-derived grounding data, pick the model to use, and test and validate the generated responses.

Enable the target object for generative prompting, develop the prompt within the prompt workspace, select records to fine-tune and ground the response, enable the Trust Layer, and associate the prompt to an action.
explanation: Prompt Builder requiere desarrollar en el prompt workspace, usar recursos de grounding, seleccionar el modelo y validar los resultados, no solo crear una plantilla. Debe configurarse correctamente para respuestas confiables.

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to troubleshoot their Agent's performance. Which tool should they use to review agent execution details?
options: Event Logs.
Platform Debug Logs.
Agent Analytics dashboard.
explanation: Event Logs es la herramienta correcta para revisar detalles de ejecucion del agente y hacer troubleshooting de su rendimiento. Proporciona informacion detallada sobre las interacciones, errores y el comportamiento del agente durante la ejecucion.

question: Universal Containers has an active standard email prompt template that does not fully deliver on the business requirements. Which steps should an Agentforce Specialist take to use the content of the standard prompt email template in question and customize it to fully meet the business requirements?
options: Save as New Version and edit as needed.
Clone the existing template and modify as needed.
Save as New Template and edit as needed.
explanation: The original answer ('Save as New Template') is not the formally recommended phrasing, and its explanation incorrectly discussed the Testing Center. The correct answer and established practice for standard, read-only templates is to 'Clone the existing template and modify as needed' to create an editable custom version.

question: Universal Containers is using Agentforce for Sales to find similar opportunities to help close deals faster. The team wants to understand the criteria used by the Agent to match opportunities. What should they know?
options: Matched opportunities are limited to the same account.
Matched opportunities are based on industry and deal size across all accounts.
Matched opportunities have a status of Closed Won from the last 12 months.
explanation: When using the Find Similar Opportunities action, the system matches opportunities that have a status of Closed Won and a close date within the last 12 months. It does not limit matches to the same account, as the goal is to leverage successful deal strategies across the organization. The original answer was incorrect because restricting matches to the same account would severely limit the usefulness and learning potential of the feature.

question: At Universal Containers, junior sales reps struggle with objection handling and price negotiations for complex deals. The manager lacks time to guide each rep personally. The reps want a tool to practice pitches by simulating tough conversations and receive personalized feedback specific to their commerce opportunity. Which Salesforce solution should an Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Employee Coach
SDR Agent
Sales Coach
explanation: Sales Coach es la solucion correcta para que los reps practiquen manejo de objeciones y negociaciones mediante simulaciones de conversaciones dificiles y reciban feedback personalizado basado en sus oportunidades especificas. Esta disenado exactamente para el coaching y entrenamiento del equipo de ventas.

question:
The sales team at a hotel resort would like to generate a guest summary about the guests' interests and provide recommendations based on their activity preferences captured in each guest profile. They want the summary to be available only on the contact record page. 
Which AI capability should the team use?
options: Einstein Agentforce
Prompt Builder
Model Builder
explanation: Prompt Builder te permite crear una plantilla de prompt de Generación de Campos (Field Generation) que puede ejecutarse directamente desde un campo en la página del registro del Contacto (usando Dynamic Forms) para mostrar el resumen del invitado.

question:
Universal Containers wants to implement a solution in Salesforce with a custom UX that allows users to enter a sales order number. Subsequently, the system will invoke a custom prompt template to create and display a summary of the sales order header and sales order details. 
Which solution should an AI Specialist implement to meet this requirement?
options: Create a screen flow to collect sales order number and invoke the prompt template using the standard "Prompt Template" flow action.
Create a template-triggered prompt flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template” flow action.
Create an autolaunched flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template" flow action.
explanation: Para permitir una experiencia de usuario (UX) personalizada donde un usuario introduce un número y luego se muestra un resumen generado por IA, la solución ideal es crear un Screen Flow que capture el dato y luego invoque la plantilla a través de la acción de flujo 'Prompt Template'.

question: Which scenario best illustrates the use of Model Context Protocol (MCP) in an enterprise AI deployment?
options: A legal assistant agent using MCP to dynamically find a document classification API to analyze case files
A customer service agent engaging another agent in real-time conversation to resolve tickets
A sales agent discovering other agents' capabilities using Agent Cards
explanation: MCP se ilustra mejor con un agente que lo usa para descubrir y conectarse dinamicamente a herramientas y APIs externas, como una API de clasificacion de documentos. La opcion B describe A2A y la opcion C describe el uso de Agent Cards, que son parte del protocolo A2A para descubrimiento de capacidades entre agentes.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is rolling out an Al-powered support assistant to help customer service agents quickly retrieve relevant troubleshooting steps and policy guidelines. The assistant relies on a search index in Data Cloud that contains product manuals, policy documents, and past case resolutions. During testing, UC notices that agents are receiving too many irrelevant results from older product versions that no longer apply. How should UC address this issue?
options: Create a custom retriever in Einstein Studio, and apply filters for publication date and product line.
Use the default retriever, as it already searches the entire search index and provides broad coverage.
Modify the search index to only store documents from the last year and remove older records.
explanation: La solución recomendada para afinar los resultados de búsqueda en Data Cloud y evitar contenido obsoleto es crear un 'Custom Retriever' (Recuperador Personalizado) en Einstein Studio. Esto permite aplicar filtros de metadatos específicos (como la fecha de publicación o la línea de productos) antes de enviar el contexto al LLM, mejorando la relevancia sin eliminar datos históricos.

question: Universal Containers (UC) needs to create a custom prompt template that can be called from a Lightning web component. Which prompt template type should UC create?
options: Field Generation
Sales Email
Flex
explanation: El tipo Flex es el unico prompt template que puede ser invocado desde un Lightning Web Component a traves de la API de Salesforce. Field Generation y Sales Email estan ligados a contextos especificos de UI y no pueden llamarse directamente desde un LWC personalizado.

question:
A Salesforce Administrator is exploring the capabilities of Einstein Agentforce or copilot  to enhance user interaction within their organization. They are particularly interested in how Einstein Agentforce or copilot  processes user requests and the mechanism it employs to deliver responses. The administrator is evaluating whether Einstein Agentforce or copilot  directly interfaces with a large language model (LLM) to fetch and display responses to user inquiries, facilitating a broad range of requests from users. 
How does Einstein Agentforce or copilot  handle user requests In Salesforce?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot  will trigger a flow that utilizes a prompt template to generate the message.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  will perform an HTTP callout to an LLM provider.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  analyzes the user's request and LLM technology is used to generate and display the appropriate response.
explanation: Agentforce analiza la solicitud del usuario y usa tecnología LLM para generar y mostrar la respuesta apropiada, actuando como una capa inteligente sobre el LLM. No hace HTTP callouts directos al LLM ni simplemente dispara flows; procesa la solicitud de forma integrada en la plataforma.
